\scriptsize
Every file shares the join keys \texttt{crop\_name}, \texttt{adm\_id};

\smallskip
\begin{tabular}{@{}llp{0.52\linewidth}@{}}
\toprule
File & \# columns & Columns beyond the shared keys \\\\
\midrule
\texttt{crop\_calendar\_maize\_IE.csv} & 4 & \texttt{sos} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{eos} (\textsc{n}) \\
\texttt{crop\_mask\_maize\_IE.csv} & 4 & \texttt{crop\_area} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{crop\_area\_percentage} (\textsc{n}) \\
\texttt{fpar\_maize\_IE.csv} & 4 & \texttt{date} (\textsc{d}), \texttt{fpar} (\textsc{n}) \\
\texttt{location\_maize\_IE.csv} & 5 & \texttt{latitude} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{longitude} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{region\_area} (\textsc{n}) \\
\texttt{meteo\_maize\_IE.csv} & 11 & \texttt{date} (\textsc{d}), \texttt{tmin} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{tmax} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{prec} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{rad} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{tavg} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{et0} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{vpd} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{cwb} (\textsc{n}) \\
\texttt{ndvi\_maize\_IE.csv} & 4 & \texttt{date} (\textsc{d}), \texttt{ndvi} (\textsc{n}) \\
\texttt{soil\_maize\_IE.csv} & 5 & \texttt{awc} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{bulk\_density} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{drainage\_class} (\textsc{n}) \\
\texttt{soil\_moisture\_maize\_IE.csv} & 5 & \texttt{date} (\textsc{d}), \texttt{ssm} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{rsm} (\textsc{n}) \\
\texttt{yield\_maize\_IE.csv} & 7 & \texttt{country\_code} (\textsc{t}), \texttt{harvest\_year} (\textsc{i}), \texttt{yield} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{harvest\_area} (\textsc{n}), \texttt{production} (\textsc{n}) \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}

\scriptsize
\textbf{Name:} Maize Agricultural and Environmental Data for Ireland

\smallskip
\textbf{Description:} A comprehensive dataset containing maize crop calendar, area, meteorological, vegetation index, soil, and yield data for administrative regions in Ireland, covering the period 2000-2004.

\smallskip
\textbf{Keywords:} maize, agriculture, Ireland, crop, meteorology, soil, yield, NDVI, FPAR

\smallskip
\textbf{inLanguage:} \texttt{en}
\end{tcolorbox}

\scriptsize
\textbf{filesets.includes:} [\texttt{crop\_calendar\_maize\_IE.csv}, \texttt{crop\_mask\_maize\_IE.csv}, \texttt{fpar\_maize\_IE.csv}, \texttt{location\_maize\_IE.csv}, \texttt{meteo\_maize\_IE.csv}, \texttt{ndvi\_maize\_IE.csv}, \texttt{soil\_maize\_IE.csv}, \texttt{soil\_moisture\_maize\_IE.csv}, \texttt{yield\_maize\_IE.csv}] \quad \textbf{excludes:} \textit{(none)}

\smallskip
9 \textbf{'recordsets'}, one per file, together declaring 49 fields.
Every recordset takes \texttt{adm\_id} as its \texttt{key}. All 49 fields have \texttt{isArray: false} and \texttt{references: null}.

\smallskip
\textbf{Excerpt} --- \texttt{recordsets[3]}:

\vspace{2pt}
{\ttfamily\scriptsize\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\mbox{}source:~location\_maize\_IE.csv \\
\mbox{}key:~~~~adm\_id \\
\mbox{}fields: \\
\mbox{}~~~~crop\_name~~~~Text \\
\mbox{}~~~~adm\_id~~~~~~~Text \\
\mbox{}~~~~latitude~~~~~Number \\
\mbox{}~~~~longitude~~~~Number \\
\mbox{}~~~~region\_area~~Number \\
\mbox{}examples: \\
\mbox{}~~~~crop\_name:~maize, \\
\mbox{}~~~~~~~~~adm\_id:~IE04, \\
\mbox{}~~~~~~~~~latitude:~54.36326, \\
\mbox{}~~~~~~~~~longitude:~-7.69801, \\
\mbox{}~~~~~~~~~region\_area:~25740
\par}
\vspace{2pt}

\textbf{Type assignment across all 49 fields:} Number 25, Text 19, Date 4, Integer 1.
\end{tcolorbox}
\end{minipage}

\caption{\textbf{Example of metadata generation for a multi-file dataset by Qwen 3.5.} $\name$ receives 9 related CSV files (top) and emits a Croissant record (bottom), spanning descriptive, technical , and structural metadata. The generated metadata is formatted as a JSON file, which has been rendered human-readable for this figure. No creator-annotated metadata exists for this dataset, as CY-Bench was annotated at the level of all its datasets, so no reference is shown. Data from \cite{kallenberg2026cy}.}
\label{fig:example_metadata_multifile}
\end{figure*}
